name: Dusky Catalyst (Rehearsal)
description: Notes In comparison to the original Dusky Catalyst the damage values are greatly reduced, but equip stats remain the same. Although it might still be a solid option for a wand, it’s rather difficult to obtain due to the limited availability of the Rehearsal Shatters. And thus this item will most likely stay a vanity item for a while.
effects: Reduces the Magic casting cost of your Ability by 5% Shots hit multiple targets Wavy shots
On Shoot: When in combat, WIS Decrease (-10 WIS) for 1 second.
